title: Strategic Insights
subtitle: Comprehensive strategic insights and innovation portfolio analytics

ai_insights.title: AI-Powered Insights
ai_insights.subtitle: Intelligent analysis of your innovation portfolio
ai_insights.exceptional_roi_description: Your innovation portfolio is delivering {{roi}}% ROI, significantly outperforming industry benchmarks of 8-12%. This indicates highly efficient capital allocation.
ai_insights.roi_below_target_description: Current ROI of {{roi}}% is below the target threshold. Consider reallocating resources to higher-performing innovation categories.
ai_insights.runway_critical_description: Only {{runway}} months of runway remaining at current burn rate. Immediate action required to secure additional funding or reduce spend.
ai_insights.healthy_position_description: Strong runway of {{runway}} months provides excellent flexibility for strategic initiatives and expansion opportunities.
ai_insights.well_diversified_description: Diversification score of {{score}}% across {{categories}} categories reduces risk and increases probability of breakthrough innovations.
ai_insights.diversification_opportunity_description: Portfolio concentration detected. Expanding into additional innovation categories could improve risk-adjusted returns.
ai_insights.high_alignment_description: {{alignment}}% of initiatives aligned with strategic priorities. This strong alignment increases probability of long-term value creation.
ai_insights.rapid_velocity_description: Average time-to-market of {{velocity}} months is {{percent}}% faster than industry average, enabling quick value capture.
ai_insights.high_value_asset_description: Top innovation asset showing {{liquidity}}% liquidity score with projected value of {{value}} SAR. Fast-track for maximum impact.

roi_overview.title: Innovation ROI Overview
roi_overview.narration: Our innovation portfolio has generated an impressive 28.5% ROI with a portfolio value of 20.4M SAR. Investment flow analysis shows strong capital allocation from awards and sponsorships.

investment_returns.title: Investment vs Returns Trend
investment_returns.narration: Over the last 12 months, we've seen consistent growth in both investments and returns, with returns exceeding investments by Q3, indicating positive momentum.

portfolio_diversification.title: Portfolio Diversification
portfolio_diversification.narration: Our innovation portfolio maintains excellent diversification with a score of 85%, spread across 8 categories and 120 total assets, reducing overall risk.

risk_return.title: Risk-Return Matrix
risk_return.narration: The risk-return matrix shows a healthy balance of high-return, low-risk ideas in the sweet spot, with strategic bets in higher-risk opportunities.

top_assets.title: Top Asset Performance
top_assets.narration: Our top 10 assets show strong performance with positive 30-day trends, high liquidity scores, and risk-adjusted returns averaging 1.2M SAR per asset.

financial_health.title: Financial Health Metrics
financial_health.narration: Current burn rate is 178K SAR per month with a healthy 56.2 month runway. Budget utilization across challenges averages 75%, indicating efficient capital deployment.

cash_flow.title: Cash Flow Projections
cash_flow.narration: Cash flow projections remain positive for the next 12 months, with balanced inflows and outflows maintaining operational sustainability.

economic_impact.title: Economic & Strategic Impact
economic_impact.narration: Our innovation program has created 1.85M SAR in direct economic value, generated 42 jobs, and achieved 78.3% strategic alignment with national priorities.

success_funnel.title: Innovation Success Funnel
success_funnel.narration: The Sankey diagram visualizes our innovation journey: from 120 submissions through shortlisting and winner selection, to 24 successfully implemented projects - a 20% conversion rate.

summary.title: Summary & Conclusion
summary.narration: In summary: 28.5% ROI, 85% diversification, 56 months runway, and 78% strategic alignment. Our innovation portfolio demonstrates strong financial health and strategic value creation.
